headline: Here is Why Atmos Energy (ATO) is Among the 10 Best Utility Stocks that Beat Earnings Estimates
summary: Atmos Energy Corporation (NYSE:ATO) is one of the 10 Best Utility Stocks that Beat Earnings Estimates. On May 6, 2026, Atmos Energy Corporation (NYSE:ATO) reported results for its fiscal second quarter ended March 31, 2026. The company posted net income of $984.9M. During the quarter, capital expenditures totaled $2.0B, with more than 85% allocated toward […]
